name: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc.
business: Texas Community Bancshares is a bank holding company that, through its subsidiary Broadstreet Bank, takes deposits from the general public and invests those deposits in residential real estate loans, commercial real estate loans, construction and land loans, and to a lesser extent commercial loans and consumer loans. The bank primarily serves individuals and businesses in its primary market area of Franklin, Hopkins, Smith, Van Zandt, and Wood counties in Texas. At December 31, 2025, the company had total consolidated assets of $429.8 million, net loans of $303.2 million, deposits of $327.9 million, and stockholders equity of $53.8 million.
